scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,desktop -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/renderer" "npm run dev -w apps/desktop"
scripts.package:engine: cd engine && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean --onedir --name aiview-engine --distpath ..\apps\desktop\engine-dist-build --collect-submodules uvicorn --collect-submodules websockets --collect-all ccxt --add-data "app\ai\prompts;app\ai\prompts" pyi_entry.py
scripts.package: npm run build -w apps/renderer && npm run build -w apps/desktop && npm run package:engine && node scripts/prepare-package.mjs && npm run dist -w apps/desktop
